sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100290" key="sunepinh/xomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-νήχομαι</orth>, <sense id="n100290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">float on</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the surface together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
